'''鈭歾-sh-j-dh''' ('''kazashjedhoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:evene|evene]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-sh-j-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:evene|evene]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾-sh-j-dh
|-
! Lemma
| kazashjedhoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizashjedhoko|thizashjedhoko]] || [[word:jizashjedhoko|jizashjedhoko]] || [[word:shizashjedhoko|shizashjedhoko]] || [[word:kizashjedhoko|kizashjedhoko]]
|-
